metadata.description: Linux administrator username for SSH access.
SSH public key used to sign in to the VM.
VM size for the personal deployment.
Managed data disk size in GiB for /data.
Region used for Azure resources created by this template. Defaults to southeastasia and is independent from the resource group location.
Optional custom hostname. If empty, Azure-generated public DNS is used.
Authentication mode for Azure OpenAI. 'key' uses an API key, 'managedIdentity' uses the VM system-assigned managed identity with Entra ID. Leave empty to skip Azure OpenAI setup.
Optional Azure OpenAI resource endpoint, for example https://myresource.openai.azure.com.
Optional Azure OpenAI deployment name used by OpenClaw as the primary model ref.
Optional API key for the Azure OpenAI resource.

Optional. Resource group of the Azure OpenAI resource. Leave empty if it is in the same resource group as this deployment. Only needed for Managed Identity mode when the Azure OpenAI resource is in a different resource group.
Optional Feishu App ID for WebSocket bot integration.
Optional Feishu App Secret for WebSocket bot integration.
Optional Microsoft Teams Bot App ID. Fill in both Teams fields together, or leave both empty. Azure Global only.
Optional Microsoft Teams Bot App Password. Fill in both Teams fields together, or leave both empty. Azure Global only.

variables.msteamsWebhookUrl: [if(empty(parameters('hostname')), format('https://{0}{1}', variables('publicFqdn'), variables('msteamsWebhookPath')), format('https://{0}{1}', parameters('hostname'), variables('msteamsWebhookPath')))]
variables.azureOpenAiValidationMode: [if(empty(variables('azureOpenAiEffectiveAuthMode')), if(and(empty(parameters('azureOpenAiEndpoint')), empty(parameters('azureOpenAiDeployment')), empty(parameters('azureOpenAiApiKey'))), 'disabled', string(int('When azureOpenAiAuthMode is not set, azureOpenAiEndpoint, azureOpenAiDeployment, and azureOpenAiApiKey must either all be provided or all be empty.'))), if(equals(variables('azureOpenAiEffectiveAuthMode'), 'key'), if(and(not(empty(parameters('azureOpenAiEndpoint'))), not(empty(parameters('azureOpenAiDeployment'))), not(empty(parameters('azureOpenAiApiKey')))), 'enabled', string(int('azureOpenAiAuthMode key requires azureOpenAiEndpoint, azureOpenAiDeployment, and azureOpenAiApiKey.'))), if(and(not(empty(parameters('azureOpenAiEndpoint'))), not(empty(parameters('azureOpenAiDeployment')))), 'enabled', string(int('azureOpenAiAuthMode managedIdentity requires azureOpenAiEndpoint and azureOpenAiDeployment.')))))]
variables.feishuValidationMode: [if(and(empty(parameters('feishuAppId')), empty(parameters('feishuAppSecret'))), 'disabled', if(and(not(empty(parameters('feishuAppId'))), not(empty(parameters('feishuAppSecret')))), 'enabled', string(int('feishu parameters feishuAppId and feishuAppSecret must either both be provided or both be empty.'))))]
variables.msteamsValidationMode: [if(and(empty(parameters('msteamsAppId')), empty(parameters('msteamsAppPassword'))), 'disabled', if(and(not(empty(parameters('msteamsAppId'))), not(empty(parameters('msteamsAppPassword'))), not(variables('isAzureChinaCloud'))), 'enabled', string(int('Microsoft Teams standard mode requires both msteamsAppId and msteamsAppPassword, and is supported only in Azure Global.'))))]

azureOpenAiRoleAssignmentHint.value: [if(variables('isManagedIdentityAuth'), format('If the Azure portal shows the deployment as partially failed, it means the automatic role assignment did not succeed (usually because the deploying user does not have Owner or User Access Administrator role). The VM and OpenClaw are fully functional regardless. To assign the role manually, run: az role assignment create --assignee {0} --role "Cognitive Services OpenAI User" --scope /subscriptions/{1}/resourceGroups/{2}/providers/Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts/{3}', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', parameters('vmName')), '2024-03-01', 'full').identity.principalId, subscription().subscriptionId, variables('resolvedAzureOpenAiResourceGroup'), variables('azureOpenAiResourceName')), '')]
